summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Kennards-style customer document portal system. All key features tested including machine document URLs, QR scan page documents section, Customer Portal contract lookup, and hire contracts management. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend UI working correctly with proper integration.
passed_tests: Machine CRUD operations with 5 document URL fields
QR scan endpoint returning documents structure
Hire contracts CRUD operations (create, read, filter, complete)
Customer Portal contract lookup (HC-2024-001 found successfully)
Machine form with all 5 document URL input fields
QR scan page loading and navigation
Customer Portal UI and contract search functionality
Hire contracts management UI (list, filters, create form)
Documents section display in Customer Portal for existing contracts
Backend API comprehensive testing (22/22 tests passed)
Document downloads available from both QR page and Customer Portal
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (All UI components and integrations working)
